reasoning: Dr. Voss was last seen alive drafting an email at 9:15 PM. The syringe found in the sharps container on Floor 4 contained potassium chloride, matching the cause of death. Dr. Blake's lab coat was found in the Floor 4 laundry bin, indicating he had been on Floor 4 despite his claim of being in the ER all night. Witness observations confirm someone in a white coat was seen near Room 401 around 9:30 PM, which aligns with the timeline of Dr. Voss's death. Dr. Blake had the motive due to being confronted about falsifying data, and he had access to the syringe.
